title: Urban Tracker Dataset Schema
description: JSON schema for validating RDL Urban Tracker dataset definitions

dataset.title: Dataset Definition
dataset.description: Definition of a dataset including its metadata, requirements, and relationships to standards

Example URL.description: URL reference to the dataset or data source

City.description: Name the city that this dataset is relevant to (e.g., New York City)

Category.description: Datatype category this dataset is relevant to (e.g., Land and Water)

Name.description: Datatype this dataset is relevant to (e.g., Protected Areas)
